modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: New program SentinelOne Agent appeared on my computer.

full_description_text:  
Un nuevo programa llamado SentinelOne Agent apareció en mi computadora. No sé qué es. ¿Es algo que debería tener? No recuerdo instalarlo.
short_description: New program SentinelOne Agent appeared on my computer.
description: Un nuevo programa llamado SentinelOne Agent apareció en mi computadora. No sé qué es. ¿Es algo que debería tener? No recuerdo instalarlo.
